description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a compact bullpup configuration, placing the magazine and action behind the trigger for a shorter overall length. The body is predominantly matte black, with angular, geometric lines and a robust, industrial appearance. The barrel is relatively short and appears to be fitted with a suppressor, extending slightly beyond the handguard. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, forming a solid, blocky structure that enhances stability. The grip is ergonomic and positioned forward, with a trigger guard and a visible magazine well. There are no visible advanced optics or rail attachments, giving the rifle a streamlined, utilitarian look.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with an integrated stock, suppressor, and ergonomic grip, featuring angular, modern lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the integrated stock, suppressor, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the narrow, streamlined barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blocky, integrated stock and the back of the receiver.
